facebook.caption:
Tourists keep walking past Bãi Dài. That's exactly why you should stop.

No beach clubs. No hawkers every 10 meters. Just wide open sand and water that actually looks like the photos.

This is the north end of Phu Quoc most package tours never reach. Go early, go on a weekday, and you'll have stretches of it to yourself.

Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Watch how empty this beach is at 8am. Bãi Dài, Phu Quoc. No crowds, no vendors, just this. Your move.

instagram.caption:
Locals don't post about Bãi Dài. So we will.

North Phu Quoc, no crowds, wide open sand. Go early.

Tag your travel buddy.
instagram.video_caption: Empty beach. North Phu Quoc. 8am. Bãi Dài delivers every time.

tiktok.caption: The beach tourists skip in Phu Quoc. Bãi Dài, north end. Go early. #PhuQuoc #PhuQuocBeaches #VietnamTravel #TravelTips

scenes: Bare feet hit wet sand, no one around
Pan across clear water, no boats
Wide shot: zero beach chairs in frame
Close-up of calm waves at golden hour
video_script.cta: Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
